title: Reflections Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A plan or rule that helps people decide what to do.
rounds.answer: policy
rounds.explanation: policy: A plan or rule that helps people decide what to do.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A feeling of worry or stress when things are not calm.
rounds.answer: tension
rounds.explanation: tension: A feeling of worry or stress when things are not calm.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A break or crack in something hard, like bone or stone.
rounds.answer: fracture
rounds.explanation: fracture: A break or crack in something hard, like bone or stone.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A large area inside a building where people wait or meet.
rounds.answer: lobby

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A way to measure something, or a new aspect of a situation.
rounds.answer: dimension

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: The way you hold your body when you sit or stand.
rounds.answer: posture

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: Our school has a policy that everyone must wear a uniform.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The function of a pencil is to help us write.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The protective glass around the charter keeps it safe.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Cracked Charter, part 3': “And that’s the most powerful kind of _____.” As they left, the cracked charter remained in its case — but now, it had...
rounds.answer: constitution
rounds.explanation: The text says: “And that’s the most powerful kind of constitution.” As they left, the cracked charter remained in its case — but now, it had new meaning.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Reflections: source text 1': Read the Story file, 'The Cracked _____', and answer the reflection questions.
rounds.answer: Charter
rounds.explanation: The text says: Read the Story file, 'The Cracked Charter', and answer the reflection questions.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Cracked Charter, part 1': This symbol is _____ — it belonged to the regional capital, not our township.” “Why would their symbol be on our...
rounds.answer: legislative
rounds.explanation: The text says: This symbol is legislative — it belonged to the regional capital, not our township.” “Why would their symbol be on our charter?” asked Adam.

games.title: Reading Detective

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1: Choral Verse Performance
rounds.target: Our school has a policy that everyone must wear a uniform.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 3: Present Your Poem
rounds.target: When your haiku or simile poem is finished, practise presenting it to an audience.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 5: Explain and Respond
rounds.target: Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The students used a collaborative approach to create their mural.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The museum has many artifacts from ancient civilisations.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The wind hurled dirt across the road.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'infection' mean in this unit?
choices: A sickness caused by germs that can spread.
A plan or rule that helps people decide what to do.
A set of rules that explains how a country or organisation works.
rounds.answer: A sickness caused by germs that can spread.
rounds.explanation: infection: A sickness caused by germs that can spread.

rounds.prompt: What does 'vulture' mean in this unit?
choices: A plan or rule that helps people decide what to do.
A set of rules that explains how a country or organisation works.
A large bird that eats dead animals.
rounds.answer: A large bird that eats dead animals.
rounds.explanation: vulture: A large bird that eats dead animals.

rounds.prompt: What does 'constitution' mean in this unit?
choices: A special job or task that someone is trying to do.
A set of rules that explains how a country or organisation works.
A plan or rule that helps people decide what to do.
rounds.answer: A set of rules that explains how a country or organisation works.
rounds.explanation: constitution: A set of rules that explains how a country or organisation works.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'alternative'?
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: alternative is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'personification'?
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: personification is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'expansion'?
rounds.answer: Noun

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: A set of rules that explains how a country or organisation works.
A special job or task that someone is trying to do.
Understanding what you read or hear.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: A sickness caused by germs that can spread.
Very simple and not advanced or developed.
Working together with others to achieve something.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: A large bird that eats dead animals.
A unit of sound with one vowel sound.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: What does 'charter' mean?
choices: A special document that gives rights or rules to a group.
A special job or task that someone is trying to do.
The process of something getting bigger or growing.
The special purpose or job that something has.
rounds.answer: A special document that gives rights or rules to a group.
rounds.explanation: The school received a charter to start a new programme for students.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Cracked Charter, part 1': “Here, people argued about _____, voted on rules, and wrote early drafts of our town’s constitution.” Amal walked...
rounds.answer: policy
rounds.explanation: The text says: “Here, people argued about policy, voted on rules, and wrote early drafts of our town’s constitution.” Amal walked slowly across the tiled floor.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Cracked Charter, part 1': Ishmael, the museum guide, in the _____.
rounds.answer: lobby
rounds.explanation: The text says: Ishmael, the museum guide, in the lobby.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: What does 'policy' mean?
choices: A plan or rule that helps people decide what to do.
A set of rules that explains how a country or organisation works.
A special document that gives rights or rules to a group.
Related to making laws or rules.
rounds.answer: A plan or rule that helps people decide what to do.
rounds.explanation: Our school has a policy that everyone must wear a uniform.

rounds.prompt: What does 'lobby' mean?
choices: A large area inside a building where people wait or meet.
A special document that gives rights or rules to a group.
A special job or task that someone is trying to do.
Related to making laws or rules.
rounds.answer: A large area inside a building where people wait or meet.
rounds.explanation: We waited in the lobby of the museum for our guide.

rounds.prompt: What does 'constitution' mean?
choices: A set of rules that explains how a country or organisation works.
A special job or task that someone is trying to do.
Related to making laws or rules.
The special purpose or job that something has.
rounds.answer: A set of rules that explains how a country or organisation works.
rounds.explanation: The constitution of our school tells us the rights and rules we follow.
